notes: Scores are heuristic matches from nearby text, picture name, or picture description.
shape-label entries found a matching label but no extractable media asset.
Items in missing_required_assets need manual review, fallback icons, or a shape-copy implementation.
PowerPoint shape-only entries may need fallbacks; current NAT, SGW, Exadata, and Firewall mappings use draw.io-derived PNG assets.
drawio-vector entries were extracted from OCI Library.xml by scripts/extract_drawio_icons.py.
drawio-raster entries are PNG fallbacks rendered from draw.io SVG assets for PPTX preview compatibility.
